# pexip_infinity_h323_gatekeeper (Resource)

Manages an H.323 gatekeeper. H.323 gatekeepers provide address resolution and call routing services for H.323 endpoints and gateways.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_h323_gatekeeper" "example" {
  name    = "Corporate H.323 Gatekeeper"
  address = "gatekeeper.company.com"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The IPv4 address or hostname of the H.323 gatekeeper. Maximum length: 255 characters.
- `name` (String) The name used to refer to this H.323 gatekeeper. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the H.323 gatekeeper. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `port` (Number) The RAS port of the H.323 gatekeeper. Range: 1 to 65535. Default: 1719.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the H323 gatekeeper.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the H.323 gatekeeper
